description_long: This is a compact, boxy camper vehicle with a predominantly white exterior and black trim details. The camper features a streamlined cab at the front, seamlessly integrated with the living compartment, and is equipped with side windows and a small door for entry. The right side displays two rectangular windows and a horizontal black stripe, while the left side has a single window and a similar stripe. The front of the camper is characterized by a windshield, headlights, and a grille, while the rear is plain with minimal detailing. The wheels are small and positioned near the corners, providing stability and a low profile. The overall design suggests a modern, utilitarian camper suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A compact, white camper vehicle with black trim, side windows, and a streamlined cab integrated with the living compartment. It features a modern, boxy design with small wheels and minimal rear detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the windshield, headlights, and grille of the camper.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying two rectangular windows, a black stripe, and the entry door.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, flat surface and minimal detailing.
description_view_3: Left side view showing a single window and a black stripe.
attribute_window_configuration: two rectangular windows on the right side, one rectangular window on the left side, large windshield at the front
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the right side near the front
